title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-18: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of endoscopic equipment
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-18部分：内窥镜设备的基本安全和基本性能专用要求

title.en: Endoscopes - Medical endoscopes and endotherapy devices - Part 1: General requirements
title.zh: 内窥镜 - 医用内窥镜和内镜治疗器械 - 第1部分：通用要求

standards.abstract: Defines terms and requirements for endoscopes and endotherapy devices used in practice of medicine. Edition 5, replaces ISO 8600-1:2015. Published 2025-03.
standards.scope: General requirements for medical endoscopes and endotherapy devices.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-2: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of high frequency surgical equipment and high frequency surgical accessories
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-2部分：高频手术设备和高频手术附件的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.abstract: Applies to basic safety and essential performance of HF surgical equipment and accessories. Edition 6.1 (consolidated with Amendment 1:2023). Covers electrosurgery, diathermy.
standards.note: EN IEC 60601-2-2:2018/A1:2024 published for EU harmonization.

title.en: Systems for evacuation of plume generated by medical devices
title.zh: 医疗器械产生的烟雾排放系统

standards.abstract: Requirements and guidelines for systems used to evacuate plume generated by medical devices during endoscopic, laparoscopic and open surgical procedures. Edition 2.
standards.scope: Plume evacuation systems for endoscopic and surgical procedures.

title.en: Endoscopes - Medical endoscopes and endotherapy devices - Part 3: Determination of field of view and direction of view of endoscopes with optics
title.zh: 内窥镜 - 医用内窥镜和内镜治疗器械 - 第3部分：带光学系统的内窥镜视野和视向的测定

standards.abstract: Specifies test methods for the determination of field of view and direction of view of endoscopes. Edition 4.
standards.scope: Optical performance testing for medical endoscopes.

title.en: Endoscopes - Medical endoscopes and endotherapy devices - Part 5: Determination of optical resolution of rigid endoscopes with optics
title.zh: 内窥镜 - 医用内窥镜和内镜治疗器械 - 第5部分：带光学系统的硬式内窥镜光学分辨率的测定

standards.abstract: Specifies methods for the determination of optical resolution of rigid endoscopes. Edition 3.
standards.scope: Optical resolution testing for rigid endoscopes.
